evidence.summary: WebContainer 1.6.4 booted Node v22.22.3 with cross-origin isolation.

checks.label: Exact upstream artifact
checks.detail: openclaw@2026.6.10 is pinned by version and integrity.

checks.label: Lifecycle scripts classified
checks.detail: The artifact declares lifecycle scripts; the browser probe must capture their behavior without silently skipping them.

checks.label: Published shrinkwrap consistency
checks.detail: The published manifest has 31 root declarations missing from shrinkwrap lockfile v3 and 0 mismatched declarations (31 missing dev dependencies); npm ci rejects the artifact even when dev dependencies are omitted.

checks.label: Native dependency inventory
checks.detail: 13 platform-specific package variants require capability-scoped handling.

checks.label: Browser host preflight
checks.detail: WebContainer 1.6.4 booted Node v22.22.3; built-in node:sqlite requires an adapter.

checks.label: OpenClaw WebContainer boot
checks.detail: The host runtime works, but this exact OpenClaw artifact has not booted in it yet.

checks.label: Gateway handshake
checks.detail: A successful hello-ok frame is required before this release can be supported.

checks.label: Provider-independent chat turn
checks.detail: A streamed mocked turn through the real agent runner is required.

checks.label: Constrained tool execution
checks.detail: The model received the real tool catalog; a deterministic tool request and result round-trip is still required.

checks.label: History after reconnect
checks.detail: History must survive a WebSocket disconnect and authenticated reconnect.

checks.label: Streaming cancellation
checks.detail: An active streamed turn must stop through chat.abort and emit an aborted event.

checks.label: Encrypted credential boundary
checks.detail: Provider credentials must remain encrypted in the browser host and outside the WebContainer filesystem.

checks.label: Provider request policy
checks.detail: Provider traffic must cross a fixed-destination, secret-redacting browser-host broker before live testing.

checks.label: OpenClaw host-broker turn
checks.detail: A real OpenClaw agent turn must cross the browser-host provider broker without mounting or logging provider credentials.

checks.label: User-configurable provider budget
checks.detail: Provider traffic needs user-visible request, input, and streamed-output limits before live opt-in.

checks.label: Protected live opt-in gate
checks.detail: Live traffic needs a fixed-prompt, cost-bounded, credential-and-consent gate before it can be enabled.

checks.label: Device pairing and token reconnect
checks.detail: A browser-owned non-extractable device key must complete Control UI pairing and a token-authenticated reconnect without leaking credentials.

checks.label: OPFS runtime recovery
checks.detail: The mock session must survive OPFS save, WebContainer restart, binary mount, and document reload.

checks.label: Measured browser runtime cost
checks.detail: Cold/warm install time, actual filesystem footprint, and Gateway-ready latency have not been measured in the browser lane.
